Product

From messy to mergeable

Refract connects to your repo. Every push triggers a scan. Every fix is reviewable. Every approved proposal becomes a PR.

View pricing →

TRANSFORM

Detect debt. Ship the fix.

Scans for 7 structural issue types and turns accepted proposals into PRs automatically.

transform pipeline screenshot

SECURITY

Nothing ships with a secret in it

Secret scanning, injection detection, dependency audits, and a configurable gate on every PR.

security scan screenshot

ANALYTICS

Know what every push costs you

A real-time feed of issues introduced, resolved, and trending — per repo, per author, per AI tool.

analytics dashboard screenshot

GUIDELINESSoon

Set the rules. Enforce them automatically.

Guidelines as code, org-wide policies, and team analytics for teams shipping AI at scale.

guidelines configuration screenshot

Every push without Refract is debt.

Structural issues don't fix themselves between sprints. They compound. Refract starts catching them today.

Free to start. One repo. Takes 5 minutes to connect.

Start for freeNo credit card required

AI writes fast. Refract makes it shippable.

Risk Disclosure: Refract provides code analysis tools and does not guarantee bug-free code. Always review proposed changes before merging.

Hypothetical Performance Disclosure: All examples and demonstrations shown are for illustrative purposes only. Actual results may vary based on your codebase, team size, and usage patterns.

Testimonials Disclosure: Testimonials appearing on this site may not be representative of all customers and do not guarantee future performance or results.
